# Monroe Residential Partners

> Monroe Residential Partners is a vertically integrated real estate development firm based in Chicago, Illinois, specializing in ground-up construction and adaptive reuse of multifamily and mixed-use apartment communities.

## About

Monroe Residential Partners is recognized as an industry leader with a half-century of combined experience in the multifamily sector. Our focus on inspirational design and uncompromised quality has led to the successful acquisition, development, and redevelopment of over 30,000 apartments and condominiums across the United States.

We specialize in boutique-style luxury communities that set the standard in their markets, with capabilities spanning site selection, entitlements, design management, construction management, and asset management.

Website: https://monroeresidential.com

## Portfolio

### Boylston — Chicago, IL
Adaptive reuse of the historic seven-story Boylston Building in River North into 36 loft-style apartments.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/boylston

### Cannery Flats — Bozeman, MT
4-story mixed-use development with 52 apartment units and 15,000 SF of ground-level retail in the Cannery District.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/cannery-flats

### 1313 West Randolph — Chicago, IL
Historic adaptive reuse of the 1927 Chicago Wholesale Florists Building into 74 loft apartments and 32,000 SF of commercial space in the West Loop.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/1313-west-randolph

### Teton Flats — Victor, ID
72 one- and two-bedroom apartments with Scandinavian architectural aesthetic, 25 miles from Jackson Hole.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/teton-flats

### Box Board Lofts — Grand Rapids, MI
Award-winning adaptive reuse of a 1917 historic warehouse into 173 loft homes with 12-foot ceilings and exposed brick.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/box-board-lofts

### Volaris Lansing — Lansing, MI
289 apartments with resort-style heated saltwater pool, fitness center, and entertainment lounge.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/volaris-lansing

### 101 West — Barrington, IL
64-unit boutique community on a 1.2-acre transit-oriented development site with rooftop terrace.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/101-west

### 851 West Grand — Chicago, IL
36 apartments across from Blue Line Grand Avenue Station in Chicago's West Loop/Fulton Market area.
https://monroeresidential.com/portfolio/851-west-grand
